PayFlow lets Nigerian freelancers receive international USDC payments and automatically convert to Naira when the exchange rate hits your target. No Payoneer. No PayPal. No high fees.

The Problem

The Pain Every Nigerian Freelancer Knows

You did the work. Getting paid shouldn't be this hard.

🚫

PayPal is Blocked in Nigeria

Over 200 million Nigerians cannot access PayPal. International clients send payments that simply never arrive.

200M+ Nigerians affected
💸

Payoneer Takes Too Much

2% conversion fee plus an 8% exchange rate spread means you lose up to $120 on every $1,000 earned. That is your money.

Up to 10% lost per transaction
⏰

You Miss the Best Rates

The NGN rate changes every hour. Without automation you convert at whatever rate exists when you remember to check — not when it is best for you.

Avg 6% better rate with automation

The Solution

PayFlow Automates Everything

Six smart workflows running 24/7 so you never miss a payment or a good rate.

01

Payment Detection

Instantly detects USDC deposits to your vault on Polygon Amoy — no manual checking required.

02

Live Rate Monitor

Checks USD/NGN exchange rate every 5 minutes via real-time API so you always know the market.

03

Smart Decision Gate

Asks you on Telegram when your target rate is hit. You reply YES or NO — simple as that.

04

Automatic Swap

Executes USDC to NGN conversion via ERC-4337 smart wallet — trustless and non-custodial.

05

Bank Transfer

Sends NGN directly to your GTBank, Access Bank or any Nigerian bank account within hours.

06

Dual Notification

Confirms payment to both you and your client via Telegram instantly — full transparency.

Process

From Invoice to Naira in 4 Steps

1

Share Your Vault Address

Send your unique PayFlow payment address to your international client. They send USDC on Polygon — fast and cheap.

2

Set Your Conversion Preference

Choose to convert immediately or set a target NGN rate. PayFlow monitors the market 24/7 so you don't have to.

3

Get Notified on Telegram

When your rate is hit, PayFlow sends you a Telegram message. Reply YES to convert. Reply NO to wait.

4

Receive NGN in Your Bank

PayFlow converts your USDC and sends NGN directly to your Nigerian bank account within 2 hours.

Freelance designers, developers, writers

Nigerian contractors for international companies

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden fees. No monthly charges. Pay only when you convert.
